'''dowashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:euchloremic|euchloremic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euchloremic|euchloremic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dowashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowashithi|dowashithi]] || [[word:dowashiji|dowashiji]] || [[word:dowashishi|dowashishi]] || [[word:dowashiki|dowashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowashuthuthu|dowashuthuthu]] || [[word:dowashujuju|dowashujuju]] || [[word:dowashushushu|dowashushushu]] || [[word:dowashukuku|dowashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowashuthu|dowashuthu]] || [[word:dowashuju|dowashuju]] || [[word:dowashushu|dowashushu]] || [[word:dowashuku|dowashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowashufthuf|dowashufthuf]] || [[word:dowashufjuf|dowashufjuf]] || [[word:dowashufshuf|dowashufshuf]] || [[word:dowashufkuf|dowashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowashethe|dowashethe]] || [[word:dowasheje|dowasheje]] || [[word:dowasheshe|dowasheshe]] || [[word:dowasheke|dowasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowashothotho|dowashothotho]] || [[word:dowashojojo|dowashojojo]] || [[word:dowashoshosho|dowashoshosho]] || [[word:dowashokoko|dowashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowashotho|dowashotho]] || [[word:dowashojo|dowashojo]] || [[word:dowashosho|dowashosho]] || [[word:dowashoko|dowashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowashofthof|dowashofthof]] || [[word:dowashofjof|dowashofjof]] || [[word:dowashofshof|dowashofshof]] || [[word:dowashofkof|dowashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowashïfthïf|dowashïfthïf]] || [[word:dowashïfjïf|dowashïfjïf]] || [[word:dowashïfshïf|dowashïfshïf]] || [[word:dowashïfkïf|dowashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowashïfthïfthïf|dowashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dowashïfjïfjïf|dowashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dowashïfshïfshïf|dowashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dowashïfkïfkïf|dowashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowashïfthïf|dowashïfthïf]] || [[word:dowashïfjïf|dowashïfjïf]] || [[word:dowashïfshïf|dowashïfshïf]] || [[word:dowashïfkïf|dowashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowashïfthïf|dowashïfthïf]] || [[word:dowashïfjïf|dowashïfjïf]] || [[word:dowashïfshïf|dowashïfshïf]] || [[word:dowashïfkïf|dowashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowashæthæ|dowashæthæ]] || [[word:dowashæjæ|dowashæjæ]] || [[word:dowashæshæ|dowashæshæ]] || [[word:dowashækæ|dowashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowashathatha|dowashathatha]] || [[word:dowashajaja|dowashajaja]] || [[word:dowashashasha|dowashashasha]] || [[word:dowashakaka|dowashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowashatha|dowashatha]] || [[word:dowashaja|dowashaja]] || [[word:dowashasha|dowashasha]] || [[word:dowashaka|dowashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowashafthaf|dowashafthaf]] || [[word:dowashafjaf|dowashafjaf]] || [[word:dowashafshaf|dowashafshaf]] || [[word:dowashafkaf|dowashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dowashasha|dowashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowashësha|dowashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowashrosha|dowashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowashmusha|dowashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowashyasha|dowashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowashnkshësha|godowashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowashnkrosha|godowashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowashnkmusha|godowashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowashnkyasha|godowashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dowawashasha|dowawashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowawashësha|dowawashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowawashrosha|dowawashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowawashmusha|dowawashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowawashyasha|dowawashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowawashnkshësha|godowawashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowawashnkrosha|godowawashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowawashnkmusha|godowawashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowawashnkyasha|godowawashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dewæshasha|dewæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dewæshësha|dewæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dewæshrosha|dewæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dewæshmusha|dewæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dewæshyasha|dewæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godewæshnkshësha|godewæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godewæshnkrosha|godewæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godewæshnkmusha|godewæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godewæshnkyasha|godewæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dowfashasha|dowfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowfashësha|dowfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowfashrosha|dowfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowfashmusha|dowfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowfashyasha|dowfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowfashnkshësha|godowfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowfashnkrosha|godowfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowfashnkmusha|godowfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowfashnkyasha|godowfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
